The alpha and beta subunits originate from the 20S proteasome of Thermoplasma acidophilum. The PA26 activator originates from Trypanosoma brucei.
the other components were similarly produced

saveframes.name: 20S-11S_complex
tags:
All subunits were deuterated at non-exchangeable sites, whereas exchangeable
sites were back-exchanged to an H2O/D2O ratio of 2:8. The concentrated solution
of the proteasome-activator complex was filled into a 3.2mm MAS rotor and
sedimented by 22 kHz MAS.

saveframes.name: sample_conditions_1
tags: All experiments were performed at 22 kHz magic-angle spinning.

tags: All experiments were performed at 22 kHz magic-angle spinning.
